reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified idle status, sent a math question, received correct response "4", and verified within 3 minutes
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent app and sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260508-164911-ld1y" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened with the agent's settings and message input interface
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the top-right status indicator
Clicked message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully entered in the input field and visible in the text box
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent and activity indicator showed "Working..." with a session "Basic Math Question" created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded within approximately 3 seconds
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the agent's answer to the math question, and screenshot captures the complete conversation
